name: Oatmeal-Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F. and grease muffin tins. Mix egg whites, milk, and oil in a bowl. Add dry ingredients and mix until combined. Fold in raisins and apples. Place batter in muffin tins; fill each about three-quarters full. Bake for 20 minutes or until centers seem dry.
